info.title: Manastore API Documentation
info.description:
API documentation for Manastore

## Authentication Guide
The API uses Bearer token authentication. Follow these steps to authenticate:

1. Login to the app with your email and password to generate your access token
2. For all authenticated requests, include your token in the Authorization header:
`Authorization: Bearer your-token-here`

## Request Headers
All requests must include the following header:
`Accept: application/json`

get.description: Returns a paginated list of orders for the authenticated user with optional filtering

post.description: Creates an order directly without going through the cart flow

422.description: Validation error or business rule violation

message.example: An unexpected error occurred while processing your order.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific order
Downloads a ZIP file containing digital codes for the order

404.description: Order not found or no invoice available

get.description: Returns digital codes for the order in JSON format

404.description: Order not found or no invoice available

get.description: Downloads a PDF invoice for the order
Returns a paginated list of products with optional filtering
Search products by term and return paginated results
Returns details for a single product

get.summary: List all wallets for the authenticated user
get.description: Returns a paginated list of wallets belonging to the authenticated user

field2: The field2 must be a valid format
The field2 must be at least 3 characters

wallet_id.description: ID of the wallet to use for payment

DownloadOrderCodesRequest.description: Request parameters for downloading order codes

DownloadOrderInvoiceRequest.description: Request parameters for downloading order invoice

ShowOrderRequest.description: Request parameters for showing a specific order

OrderResourceCollection.description: A collection of order resources with pagination
